menu.name: Menu Name
menu.menuTypeDesc: Menu type description: catalog, menu, button
menu.scopeFilterPlatformHint: View and manage platform menus (/platform/* paths)
menu.scopeFilterBusinessHint: View and manage business menus (/system/* paths)
menu.menuTypeTooltip: Catalog: a grouping node that can contain child menus; Menu: a page route; Button: an in-page action permission
menu.parentMenuTooltip: Choose the parent node for this menu; leave empty to create a top-level menu
menu.scopeTooltip: Platform: visible only to platform admins; Business: visible to domain members
menu.nameTooltip: Menu text shown in the sidebar, supports i18n keys
menu.routePathTooltip: URL path shown in the browser address bar, such as /platform/menu
menu.menuOrderTooltip: Smaller numbers appear first; equal values keep creation order
menu.menuIconTooltip: Icon shown before the menu name in the sidebar
menu.componentUrlTooltip: Front-end page file path, such as platform/home
menu.permissionCodeTooltip: Backend API permission key used for button-level access control
menu.statusTooltip: Disabled menus and their children become inaccessible
menu.hideInMenuTooltip: When set to Yes, the menu remains reachable by path but is hidden from the sidebar
